task_description: Compare wedding venues in San Francisco for 150 guests with detailed budget breakdowns and cost analysis

attributes.name: venue_name
attributes.value: The Fairmont San Francisco

attributes.name: location
attributes.value: 950 Mason Street, Nob Hill, San Francisco, CA 94108

attributes.name: venue_type
attributes.value: Historic Hotel Ballroom

attributes.name: guest_count
attributes.help_text: Number of guests for your event

attributes.name: total_cost
attributes.help_text: Total estimated cost for this venue

attributes.name: indoor_outdoor
attributes.value: Indoor with Terrace Access

attributes.name: ambiance_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: The Fairmont's Grand Ballroom features stunning 22-foot ceilings, crystal chandeliers, and classic San Francisco elegance. The historic architecture and luxurious finishes create a sophisticated atmosphere perfect for formal weddings.

attributes.name: service_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: The Fairmont provides dedicated event coordinators, experienced catering staff, and white-glove service. Their team has decades of experience hosting high-end weddings and events with exceptional attention to detail.

attributes.name: flexibility_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Moderate flexibility - must use in-house catering and preferred vendor list. Some customization allowed for menu and decor, but strict policies on outside vendors and timeline requirements.

attributes.name: parking_availability
attributes.value: Valet parking available ($45/car), nearby public parking garages

attributes.name: availability_status
attributes.value: Available - Limited Saturdays

attributes.name: notes
attributes.value: Iconic Nob Hill location with stunning city views. Includes bridal suite and groom's room. In-house catering required. Perfect for classic, elegant weddings.

attributes.name: venue_name
attributes.value: City View at METREON

attributes.name: location
attributes.value: 135 Fourth Street, SoMa, San Francisco, CA 94103

attributes.name: venue_type
attributes.value: Modern Event Space

attributes.name: indoor_outdoor
attributes.value: Indoor with Terrace Access

attributes.name: ambiance_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Modern rooftop venue with floor-to-ceiling windows offering panoramic city views. Contemporary design with clean lines and urban sophistication. The outdoor terrace provides stunning sunset views of downtown San Francisco.

attributes.name: service_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Professional event staff with good coordination. Service is reliable and attentive, though not quite at the luxury hotel level. Couples report smooth execution and responsive planning team.

attributes.name: flexibility_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Good flexibility with preferred vendor list but allows outside vendors with approval. Multiple catering options available. Customizable layouts and decor. More relaxed policies than traditional hotel venues.

attributes.name: parking_availability
attributes.value: METREON parking garage ($25/car), nearby public transit accessible

attributes.name: availability_status
attributes.value: Available

attributes.name: notes
attributes.value: Modern downtown location near Yerba Buena Gardens. Great for contemporary, urban weddings. Excellent city skyline views. Easy public transit access for guests.

attributes.name: venue_name
attributes.value: Golden Gate Club at Presidio

attributes.name: location
attributes.value: 135 Fisher Loop, Presidio, San Francisco, CA 94129

attributes.name: venue_type
attributes.value: Garden Estate

attributes.name: equipment_rentals
attributes.help_text: Tent, tables, chairs, lighting for outdoor setup

attributes.name: indoor_outdoor
attributes.value: Both Indoor & Outdoor Spaces

attributes.name: ambiance_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Stunning historic venue nestled in the Presidio with lush gardens, mature trees, and Golden Gate Bridge views. The combination of elegant indoor spaces and manicured outdoor grounds creates a romantic, natural setting perfect for garden weddings.

attributes.name: service_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Experienced event staff familiar with outdoor weddings and weather contingencies. Professional coordination and setup. Service is warm and personable while maintaining high standards throughout the event.

attributes.name: flexibility_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: High flexibility - allows outside catering from approved list, choice of vendors for most services. Customizable indoor/outdoor configurations. Weather backup plans available. Couples have significant creative control over design and flow.

attributes.name: parking_availability
attributes.value: On-site parking lot (free), additional Presidio parking nearby

attributes.name: availability_status
attributes.value: Available - Limited Saturdays

attributes.name: notes
attributes.value: National park setting with bridge views. Perfect for garden ceremonies and outdoor receptions. Weather backup plan required. Popular for spring and summer weddings. Includes getting-ready rooms.

attributes.name: venue_name
attributes.value: The Ritz-Carlton San Francisco

attributes.name: location
attributes.value: 600 Stockton Street, Nob Hill, San Francisco, CA 94108

attributes.name: venue_type
attributes.value: Historic Hotel Ballroom

attributes.name: indoor_outdoor
attributes.value: Indoor Only

attributes.name: ambiance_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: The Ritz-Carlton epitomizes luxury with its neoclassical architecture, grand ballroom featuring soaring ceilings, ornate moldings, and magnificent crystal chandeliers. The refined elegance and impeccable attention to detail create an unforgettable atmosphere of sophistication and grandeur.

attributes.name: service_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Legendary Ritz-Carlton service with dedicated wedding specialists, personal event coordinators, and highly trained staff. Every detail is meticulously planned and executed. Staff anticipates needs before they arise and delivers flawless, five-star service throughout.

attributes.name: flexibility_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Limited flexibility - exclusive in-house catering required, strict preferred vendor list. High standards mean less room for customization outside their established protocols. Premium pricing reflects their curated experience with limited deviation from their luxury brand standards.

attributes.name: parking_availability
attributes.value: Valet parking ($50/car), hotel guest parking available

attributes.name: availability_status
attributes.value: Waitlist Only

attributes.name: notes
attributes.value: Ultimate luxury wedding venue in San Francisco. Premium pricing includes exceptional service and amenities. Guest room block available at preferred rates. Perfect for formal, black-tie weddings.

attributes.name: venue_name
attributes.value: Foreign Cinema

attributes.name: location
attributes.value: 2534 Mission Street, Mission District, San Francisco, CA 94110

attributes.name: venue_type
attributes.value: Restaurant

attributes.name: indoor_outdoor
attributes.value: Both Indoor & Outdoor Spaces

attributes.name: ambiance_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Unique bohemian-chic atmosphere with an iconic outdoor courtyard featuring string lights and film projections. Industrial-meets-romantic aesthetic with exposed brick, lush greenery, and artistic touches. Perfect for couples seeking creative, unconventional wedding vibes in the Mission District.

attributes.name: service_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Award-winning restaurant with experienced culinary team and attentive service staff. Event coordination is professional and creative. Known for exceptional farm-to-table cuisine and personalized approach to each wedding celebration.

attributes.name: flexibility_rating_reasoning
attributes.value: Excellent flexibility - highly customizable menus, open to creative ideas, allows outside vendors for most services. Couples can personalize nearly every aspect. The team embraces unique visions and non-traditional celebrations. Great for couples wanting a distinctive, personalized experience.

attributes.name: parking_availability
attributes.value: Street parking, nearby public lots, BART accessible (16th Street Mission)

attributes.name: availability_status
attributes.value: Available

attributes.name: notes
attributes.value: Iconic SF restaurant venue perfect for foodie couples. Renowned for exceptional cuisine and unique atmosphere. Film projections in courtyard add distinctive touch. Best value option with artistic charm.

entities.public_identifier: SF Wedding Venue Budget Analysis - 150 Guests

attributes.name: comparison_name
attributes.value: SF Wedding Venue Budget Analysis - 150 Guests

attributes.name: average_per_guest
attributes.help_text: Average cost per guest across all venues

attributes.name: best_value_venue
attributes.value: Foreign Cinema
attributes.help_text: Best value based on cost per guest and ratings

attributes.name: highest_rated_ambiance
attributes.value: Ritz-Carlton San Francisco (9.8/10)

attributes.name: highest_rated_service
attributes.value: Ritz-Carlton San Francisco (10.0/10)

attributes.name: most_flexible
attributes.value: Foreign Cinema (9.5/10)

attributes.name: recommendations
attributes.value: For best value with unique atmosphere: Foreign Cinema ($249/guest). For luxury experience: Ritz-Carlton ($380/guest). For garden setting: Golden Gate Club ($293/guest). For modern urban vibe: City View at METREON ($294/guest). For classic elegance: The Fairmont ($343/guest).

attributes.name: checklist_name
attributes.value: Wedding Venue Decision Checklist

value.task: Check parking and accessibility for guests
Ask about weather backup plans (outdoor venues)
Read recent reviews from other couples
